title: Is AI ready to take over your prescriptions? Doctors are wary of Utah's automated refill program.
description: WASHINGTON — A prescription refill program that quietly launched in Utah earlier this year has kicked off a big medical debate: Is artificial intelligence ready to take over tasks that, until now, could only be performed by doctors?
content: At the center of the debate: state and federal laws limit prescribing to licensed medical professionals. Proponents say those laws, which have underwritten American medicine for over 100 years, should be updated to include AI chatbots and other new t... [6284 chars]

title: How AI Is Transforming the Collision Repair Industry
description: A good auto collision repair company uses a combination of skilled craftsmanship, years of experience, and specialized equipment to perform these tasks. However, modern collision repair companies want to ensure they are making accurate assessments, repair estimates, and more efficient repairs. That is why they are turning to artificial intelligence (AI) for assistance.

title: Harvey Keitel reveals why he thinks AI has already ‘failed’

title: AI tool can identify biological profiles associated with thrombosis risk
description: Two people may be the same age and have similar family histories or risk factors, yet only one of them may develop thrombosis. To better understand why this occurs, researchers from the Complex Disease Genomics Unit at the Sant Pau Research Institute (IR Sant Pau) and the Biomedical Research Networking Center for Rare Diseases (CIBERER) have developed an artificial intelligence-based tool that integrates clinical, genetic and transcriptomic information to identify signals associated with the disease.
